code-reviewer.description: Reviews code for bugs, undefined refs, null derefs, CSS mismatches, performance issues, browser compat, and UI/UX quality

qa-tester.description: QA engineer: logic bugs, collision, timing, mobile compat, memory leaks, test case generation, regression testing

docs-maintainer.description: Maintains FEATURES.md, PLAN.md, INSTRUCTIONS.md, master save file, and changelog

game-designer.description: Game design: mechanics, progression, balance, player retention, competitive analysis for roguelite games
